Literary Event: Poetry Recitation
Date: 18 April 2026
Time: 12:00 PM – 2:30 PM
Venue: Conference Hall
Maximum Participants: 35
Registration Deadline: 15 April 2026
About the Event:

The Poetry Recitation event encourages students to express emotions and creativity through poetry. Participants can recite original or famous poems in Hindi or English. Performance will be judged based on expression, voice modulation, and confidence.
Event Rules:

• Time limit: 3–4 minutes per participant.
• Offensive content is not allowed.
• Participants must mention the poet’s name if reciting published poetry.
• Judges’ decision will be final.
